codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract. The commit updates all relevant werk-cli dynamics callsites in main.rs for the H7 signature changes: detect_oscillation now passes None::<&Horizon> in cmd_show/cmd_context/cmd_run, detect_compensating_strategy now passes None::<&Horizon> in the same three paths, and predict_structural_tendency now passes None in cmd_show/cmd_tree/cmd_context/cmd_run. Imports were adjusted to include Horizon only where needed. No behavioral expansion was introduced beyond compatibility wiring.

summary: PASS. The feature is correctly implemented for H7 compatibility: all targeted CLI dynamics callsites were updated with None horizon/context arguments and the diff is scoped to the intended file and behavior. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were found in the reviewed change.
